title: The Last Turning
writer: James M. Cain, Sabine Berritz, Charles Spaak
actors: Fernand Gravey, Michel Simon, Marcel Vallée
plot: Frank, a hobo, ends up in a garage-truck stop in the middle of nowhere. Nick Marino, its older, kind and naive owner, is married to Cora, a sexy and mercenary woman half his age. Frank, although not a fan of hard work, accepts Nic...
